description: DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-ATTEST-03 B.2). A unilateral_notice review of a persona or thing: stands with only the author's signature (T-AT5.1); subject notice is DERIVED by consumers from the event stream (no native notice primitive — matchup row 6); the subject's reply is a peer record (ing.croft.attest.reviewReply), never a mutation. unilateral_private is deliberately ABSENT from the consent enum: deferred from v1 (V3 / OC-4 DECIDED), ships as a private-substrate artifact, never a fourth public consent mode. Amend = same-rkey whole-record replace (V2).

consent.description: Closed. The public tier's unilateral mode; requiring countersignature is the failure mode this exists to avoid.

dateClaim.description: A wall-clock value as an ASSERTED CLAIM inside the payload (crate: DateClaim). Never an ordering input (T-AT0.4); feeds only the freshness presentation dial (T-AT5.5). These are the only general-purpose integers in the whole lexicon set (T-AT0.2 as schema absence).
